description: A reference equipment-finance asset referencing diversified freight railcar leases with staggered contract maturities. Disclosures focus on lease coverage, maintenance reserves, and remarketing assumptions.

docs.label: Fleet schedule
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes reference railcar types, lease tenors, and customer mix assumptions.

docs.label: Maintenance report
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative inspection cadence and reserve coverage assumptions.

docs.label: Risk disclosure
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Lists utilization, maintenance, and remarketing risks for reference review.
